examples: They lacked the wherewithal to pay for the repairs.
Sith it is thy humour to give over begging, wherewithal shall we busy ourselves?
I should like to buy a new car but haven't got the wherewithal.
We do not have the legal wherewithal to prosecute deportation proceedings against 12 million people.
Cyprus itself, we are told, lacks the wherewithal to bail out its banks itself.
